tokens.name: --color-primary

tokens.reason: Derived hover variant of --color-primary.

tokens.name: --color-primary-light
tokens.reason: Derived light tint of --color-primary for secondary button hover backgrounds.

tokens.name: --color-primary-bg
tokens.reason: Derived background tint of --color-primary for hover/selected surfaces.

tokens.name: --nav-gradient-from
tokens.reason: Theme-switchable navigation gradient start; varies per [data-theme].

tokens.name: --nav-gradient-to
tokens.reason: Theme-switchable navigation gradient end; varies per [data-theme].

tokens.name: --color-primary-active
tokens.reason: Darker pressed/active variant of --color-primary; used by --sidebar-active-bg alias.

tokens.name: --sidebar-active-bg
tokens.reason: Alias token referencing --color-primary-active for sidebar active state.

tokens.name: --color-success
tokens.reason: Core semantic color for success states.

tokens.reason: Core semantic color for danger/error states.

tokens.name: --bg-page
tokens.reason: Core page-level background color.

tokens.name: --bg-surface
tokens.reason: Core card and panel surface background.

tokens.name: --bg-overlay
tokens.reason: Derived modal overlay backdrop color.

tokens.name: --bg-input
tokens.reason: Input field background; mirrors --bg-surface.

tokens.reason: Core heading and high-emphasis text color.

tokens.reason: Hint/placeholder-level text variant.

tokens.name: --text-label
tokens.reason: Label and metadata text variant.

tokens.name: --text-danger
tokens.reason: Semantic danger text; mirrors --color-danger for validation error messages.

tokens.name: --color-danger-text

tokens.name: --border-color
tokens.reason: Core default border color.

tokens.name: --border-color-hover

tokens.name: --border-width
tokens.reason: Core border width token.

tokens.name: --font-family

tokens.name: --text-xl
tokens.reason: Type scale step: card titles and section headings.

tokens.name: --text-lg

tokens.name: --text-13

tokens.name: --text-xs
tokens.reason: Type scale step: annotations, read-only text, inactive labels.

tokens.reason: Core medium font weight for headings and emphasis.

tokens.name: --weight-regular
tokens.reason: Core regular font weight for body text.
